pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade commons-io to version 2.13.0 for bug fixes and compatibility.
Change the Maven groupId to follow GitHub namespace conventions.
Update the project version to 1.4.1 to reflect the new release.
Set packaging to pom to indicate this is a parent project for modules.
Add name, description, and URL metadata to the POM for better documentation.
pom.xml.human_impl:
<name>spring-boot-logging</name>
<description>Library for HTTP logging with Spring Boot</description>
<url>https://github.com/piomin/spring-boot-logging</url>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SonarCloud properties for code quality analysis integration.
Add explicit maven.compiler.source and target properties for clarity.
Remove direct dependencies as they are now managed by child modules or Spring Boot BOM.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed <dependencies> block containing spring-context, spring-web, logstash-logback-encoder, javax.servlet-api, commons-io, slf4j-api, javax.annotation-api

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove build plugins from parent POM as they are likely defined in child modules or profiles.
Define child modules for the multi-module project structure.
